sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 애브비는 2025년 4분기 13억 달러 규모의 IPR&D 비용 발생을 반영하여 연간 및 분기 주당순이익 가이던스를 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 해당 비용 반영으로 인해 GAAP 및 조정 비GAAP 주당순이익에 각각 0.71달러의 부정적 영향이 예상됩니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 연간 조정 희석 주당순이익 가이던스는 9.90달러에서 9.94달러 범위로 제시되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 라이선스 계약 및 자산 취득에 따른 비정기적 IPR&D 비용 발생 가능성과 그 규모를 모니터링할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition Reported GAAP earnings and adjusted non-GAAP earnings for the fourth quarter of 2025 are expected to include acquired IPR&D and milestones expense of $1.3 billion on a pre-tax basis, representing an unfavorable impact of $0.71 to both GAAP diluted earnings per share and adjusted non-GAAP diluted earnings per share. Results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025 have not been finalized and are subject to our financial statement closing procedures. There can be no assurance that our final results will not differ from these preliminary estimates. While acquired IPR&D and milestones expense may be incurred upon execution of collaborations, licensing agreements, and other asset acquisitions, AbbVie does not forecast acquired IPR&D and milestones expense due to uncertainty of the future occurrence and timing of these transactions. Adjust  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $0.71 = 0.71달러.

ed diluted earnings per share guidance for 2025 previously announced on October 31, 2025 excluded the impact of acquired IPR&D and milestones expense that may be incurred beyond the third quarter of 2025. AbbVie’s full-year 2025 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of fourth quarter 2025 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $9.90 - $9.94. AbbVie’s fourth quarter 2025 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of fourth quarter 2025 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $2.61 - $2.65. Furnished as Exhibit 99.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K and incorporated herein by reference is guidance for 2025 including the estimated acquired IPR&D and milestones expense incurred during the fourth quarter of 2025. The information set forth in this Current Report on Form 8-K, including Exhibit 99.1, shall not be deemed "File  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.90 = 9.90달러; $9.94 = 9.94달러; $2.61 = 2.61달러; $2.65 = 2.65달러.
